Overrides.Override: Spells deal added Chaos Damage equal to 2% of your maximum Life Spells Cost +8% of Life Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Witchmark

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Obliteration Omen Wand Unique ID: 4d38729ac954b0f99754548ff9e0b7ca7f6d5603a8b94e850d3d06a97b14b146 Item Level: 71 Quality: 0 Sockets: B-B-B LevelReq: 53 Implicits: 1 29% increased Spell Damage Gain 38% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage Enemies you Kill have a 20% chance to Explode, dealing a quarter of their maximum Life as Chaos Damage
